text: If the person vomits during mouth-to-mouth resuscitation, the rescuer should first:

options.text: A) Ignore it and continue mouth-to-mouth ventilation
C) Turn the patient's body to the side, sweep out the mouth, and resume mouth-to-mouth resuscitation

explanation: If vomiting occurs during resuscitation, the rescuer must immediately turn the victim to their side, clear the mouth of vomit, and then resume CPR to prevent aspiration into the lungs.
